jobDescription: Responsible for the daily analysis of our rapidly expanding Live Data Service for various sporting events around the world.
jobActivities: Managed high-volume data streams for live sporting events, consistently achieving 100% accuracy and on-time delivery.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to enhance data pipeline efficiency and ensure superior data accuracy.
Utilized statistical models and predictive analytics to improve accuracy and profitability in odds compilation.
Conducted root cause analysis to accurately identify and troubleshoot issues.
Analyzed market trends to identify patterns and potential risks.
Flagged unusual betting activities and market moves that may indicate potential fraud or market manipulation.

jobDescription: Freelance Software Developer for local clients.
jobActivities: Led the design, development and deployment of 15+ web and mobile applications for local clients.
Streamlined prototyping workflows using no-code tools and Figma to deliver functional MVPs, cutting time-to-market and validation periods in half.
Orchestrated cloud infrastructure and DevOps using AWS and Docker; implemented automated environment provisioning and CI/CD workflows to enhance deployment reliability.
Oversaw code quality, version control, and agile sprint cycles across a team of 10+ engineers. Delivered production-grade systems with less than 200ms API latency and 99.9% uptime.

jobDescription: Became a part of the Software Development Team. We maintain the company website and ensure that all contents are up to date.
jobActivities: Engineered Python-based automation scripts to interface with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools, applying Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to create reusable modules for cloud provisioning.
Developed and optimized data-driven logic within legacy system migrations, ensuring all code adhered to PEP 8 standards and security best practices to maintain high-performance benchmarks.
Maintained source code integrity using Git, collaborating in an Agile SDLC environment through peer code reviews, unit testing, and comprehensive technical documentation in English.

jobDescription: I contributed to the helpdesk support team where we cater hardware and software related issues on our end users.
